_kaggle_login: Kaggle 下载需要登录: pip install kaggle，在 https://www.kaggle.com/settings 创建 API Token，将 kaggle.json 放到 ~/.kaggle/ (Windows: C:\Users\你的用户名\.kaggle\)。竞赛数据需在网页上先接受规则 (Join Competition / Accept Rules)。

sources.description: Amazon Product and Google Locations Reviews (UCI). Column 'y' = reviews per hour.
House Prices - Advanced Regression. 80+ columns (numeric + categorical). https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/house-prices-advanced-regression-techniques/data
Home Credit Default Risk. Multiple tables; this is application_train (many columns). https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/home-credit-default-risk/data
World Air Quality 2024. Many air quality columns. https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/kanchana1990/world-air-quality-data-2024-updated
U.S. Economic Indicators 1974-2024. Many economic columns. https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/alfredkondoro/u-s-economic-indicators-1974-2024
CDC BRFSS Survey 2024. Survey data, many variables. https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/rudritarahman/cdc-brfss-survey-data-2024
Tabular Feature Engineering. Many columns for feature engineering. https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/jeffheaton/tabular-feature-engineering-dataset

_search_more: 在 Kaggle 找更多多变量 CSV: 打开 https://www.kaggle.com/datasets ，搜索 tabular / CSV / many features ，左侧筛选 File type → CSV ，按 Size 或 Downloads 排序，点进数据集在 Data 里看列数。
